sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state after clicking on all S dots. I should see 7 M squares now (1 original + 6 recreated).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after recreating all M squares
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"=== Nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 100:
        print(f"  {n['color']} {n['pixels']}px (large)")
    else:
        print(f"  {n['color']} {n['pixels']}px boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Count M and S squares
m_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'M')
s_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S')
print(f"\nM squares: {m_count}")
print(f"S dots: {s_count}")

# Check white bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
white_count = ascii_lines[63].count('W')
print(f"White bar count: {white_count}")

# List all M square positions
print(f"\nM square positions:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M':
        print(f"  {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
